reviews.comment:
Bueno el automóvil club es un desastre el taller de belgrano  y paterno mejor ni enten son  unos ladrones y no saben nada y si es algo compicado  te dicen no tiene arreglo cambie el auto    ACLARO SERVICIO DE AUXILIO MECANICO EXELENTE GOMERIA A DOMICILIO DE LO MEJOR BUENOS MECÁNICOS EL DÍA QUE ESTO NO ESTÉ MEJOR HACERTE SOCIO DEL ACA URUGUAY  . LA COMISIÓN DIRECTIVA O SABE DE ESTO O NO QUIERE SABER ALGO RARO HAY ESTÁN CONCESIONADOS  ESOS TALLERES ES UNA MINA DE ORO EN ESO ESTA EL PRIBLEMA

(Translated by Google)
Well, the Automobile Club is a disaster. The workshops on Belgrano and Paterno are best left alone; they're thieves and don't know anything. If it's something complicated, they tell you it can't be fixed, just replace the car. I want to clarify that their roadside assistance service is excellent, their mobile tire service is top-notch, and their mechanics are good. The day this stops being this bad, you'd be better off becoming a member of the ACA Uruguay. The board of directors either knows about this or doesn't want to know. Something's fishy there; those workshops are run by concessionaires. It's a gold mine, and that's where the problem lies.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRMDlma3dRRRAB
